blended.narrative: Wolf Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 7" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
